svg.title: detect.py wildfire detection pipeline
svg.desc: End-to-end flow from live drone image capture through YOLO, CNN, and Grad-CAM to final output with Twilio SMS alert

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the live drone capture images for wildfire detection?')
sendPrompt('How does YOLOv8 detect fire regions in the drone image?')
sendPrompt('What does the predict_image function do in detect.py?')
g.text: Runs CNN + YOLO, assembles result dict

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the ResNet-18 CNN classify wildfire images?')
sendPrompt('What information do the YOLO bounding boxes contain?')
sendPrompt('What does the detect.py result dictionary contain?')
sendPrompt('What confidence threshold triggers a wildfire SMS alert?')
sendPrompt('How does the Twilio SMS alert work in the wildfire system?')
sendPrompt('What happens when no fire is detected?')
sendPrompt('How does Grad-CAM generate heatmaps for the wildfire dashboard?')
g.text: Highlights fire regions on dashboard image
